response.summary: Chain Snatching is the leading crime type in this view (29 cases, 14% of total). Overall volume trend for the period looks stable.

payload.query: What is the crime trend this month?

response.content:
### Crime Trends in Karnataka

Here are the top reported crime categories based on live FIR data:

| Crime Type | Total Cases |
|---|---|
| Chain Snatching | 29 |
| Theft | 24 |
| Burglary | 23 |
| Missing Person | 22 |
| Assault | 22 |
